_doc: HAND-VERIFIED festival bookings, merged ON TOP of the auto-scraped festival_lineups.json by computeFestivalScore.js. WHY: the Songkick scraper is European-summer skewed and misses the US-festival/viral acts the signal is meant to reach (Disco Lines, Gordo @ EDC/Coachella). Add CONFIRMED bookings here that the scraper can't see. Schema = festival_lineups.json (festival → tier → acts). tier: 1.0 = global flagship, 0.6 = major regional. Dedup is by festival NAME (an act on the same festival in both files counts once). acts[] MUST match rankings.json names exactly. MAINTAIN MANUALLY — verify before adding; this is the curated layer, the scraper owns the rest.
